title: Alaran Language Aware
description: This achievement is gained by learning the basics of the Alaran language.

title: Alaran Language Expert
description: This achievement is gained by becoming close to mastering the Alaran language.

title: Alaran Language Fluent
description: This achievement is gained by speaking Alaran with some proficiency.

title: Alaran Language Master
description: This achievement is gained by mastering the Alaran language.

requirements.label: Alaran Language: 100 - Update by clicking language primer books
- Complete any 5 of these tasks in Argath and Valley of Lunanyn to gain 10 points of language.
.... Complete Secure From Within from Supplykeeper Proxipid
.... Complete Gone Traitors Gone from Risathron
.... Complete Collecting the Steels from Blacksmith Zojirath
.... Complete Collecting the Blades from Blacksmith Zojirath
.... Complete Slimming the Invaders from Captain Walkath
.... Complete Fertilizer for the Crops from Mabus
.... Complete Reaping the Harvest from Mabus
.... Complete It's a Dog-Eat-Cat World Out There from Kallik the Cook
.... Complete Rat-a-chewy from Kallik the Cook
.... Complete Who You Gonna Call? from Hallay
- Complete any 3 of these tasks in Argath and Valley of Lunanyn to gain 15 points of language.
.... Complete This Is Argath from Atleris, Council Pinnacle
.... Complete Shoring Up Defenses from Atleris, Council Pinnacle
.... Complete Protect the Arms from Troopwielder Baris
.... Complete Raid and Recover from Geirdan Ath
.... Complete The Assassination Game from Geirdan Ath
.... Complete Uncharted Territory from Captain Gre Metkal
- Complete any 3 of these tasks in Argath and Valley of Lunanyn to gain 21 points of language.
.... Complete The Riddle of Steel from Atleris, Council Pinnacle
.... Complete Breaking Ballistae from Atleris, Council Pinnacle
.... Complete Critical Mass from Bursin the Legend
.... Complete The Enemy of My Enemy from Captain Gre Metkal
.... Complete The Memory Remains from Aedros
.... Complete Filthy Oashim! from Grave Digger Undros
- Complete 2 of these missions in Argath and Valley of Lunanyn to gain 24 language, one for 12.
.... Complete Reclaiming Argath from Atleris, Council Pinnacle
.... Complete Illdaera's Vengeance from Mechanic Vitesal
.... Complete Into the Abyss from Aedros
.... Complete The Herald of Oratory from Zarbak
- Complete all tasks in Sarith to gain 5. Half of them gain you 3, and one gains you 1 point.
.... Complete The Governor's Plot from Governor Parrin Wenst
.... Complete Rescue Ranger from Rebel Leader Ain Kavus
.... Complete Aid for Sarith from Guard Captain Naraind Reles
.... Complete Captain's Orders from Captain Lonz Duran
.... Complete Unforgivable Betrayal from Commander Marrien Kavus
.... Complete Systematic Oppression from Falthen Berros
.... Complete Rebel Assault from Rebel Leader Ain Kavus
.... Complete The Defeat of Prexus from Governor Parrin Wenst
- Complete all tasks in Rubak to gain 3. Half of them gain you 2, and one gains you 1 point.
.... Complete Oseka's Knowledge from Solphius Kelprunner
.... Complete Sacred Relics from Solphius Kelprunner
.... Complete Tides of Change from Solphius Kelprunner
.... Complete The Key to Freedom from Aquarn the Tidalmaster
.... Complete Begin the Offensive from Tiljin of the Deep
.... Complete Soothing the Spirits from Coraln Seagazer
.... Complete Assault the Tower from General Serobi
.... Complete Time and Tides from General Serobi
- Complete all tasks in Beast Domain to gain 3. Half of them to gain 2, and one gains you 1 point.
.... Complete Beasts for the Stew from Mea Treg
.... Complete A Question of Integrity from Mea Treg
.... Complete Message of Faith from Mea Treg
.... Complete Trial of the Beast from Treg
.... Complete One To Lead Them from Treg
.... Complete Braxi Trouble from Braxi Keeper Yubai
.... Complete Pups of War from Captain Portencia
.... Complete The King of the Beasts from Kalda Treg
- Complete all tasks in Resplendent to gain 4. Half of them to gain 2, and one gains you 1 point.
.... Complete The Light Within from Nadja Irespine
.... Complete An Initiate's Task from Chancellor Corcelia
.... Complete At Your Disposal from Chancellor Corcelia
.... Complete Death to Clan Piq`a! from Udgar the Brave
.... Complete Death to Clan Ulork! from Hoarder Paoliq
.... Complete Plannty of Tricks from Plann
.... Complete Secrets of the Stones from Reklor Irespine
.... Complete Two Sides of the Stone from Reklor Irespine
- Complete all tasks in Pillars of Alra to gain 4. Half of them to gain 2, and one gains you 1.
.... Complete The First Pilgrimage by locating the Discarded Stone Tablet
.... Complete The Word of Melretia from Selulian of Melretia
.... Complete The Word of Anriella from Il`Rator of Anriella
.... Complete The Word of Fal`Kaa from Wrakt of Fal`Kaa
.... Complete The Word of Erion from Il`Nendale of Erion
.... Complete Crisis of Faith from an apparition
.... Complete The Truth from a shade
.... Complete The Growing Threat from a shade
- Complete all tasks in Windsong to gain 4. Half of them gain you 2, and one gains you 1 point.
.... Complete Stranger in a Strange Land from Giggbledon Cogboggle
.... Complete Getting Down to Business from Giggbledon Cogboggle
.... Complete Making Music from Giggbledon Cogboggle
.... Complete Winds of Change from Kolain
.... Complete Stop the Pollution from Wasinai
.... Complete Eggscellent Eggs from Wilmina Cogboggle
.... Complete The Sound of Silence from Giggbledon Cogboggle
.... Complete The Cacophony of Power from General Terasal
- Complete all tasks in Erillion to gain 3. Half of them gain you 2, and one gains you 1 point.
.... Complete Dreams of Chaos from Joral
.... Complete A Spy Among Us from Nulbar
.... Complete Stop the Dreams from Alchemist Xortiv
.... Complete Information is King from Faltar
.... Complete The Traitor Revealed from Archon Xalvir
.... Complete The Order of Three from General Tyronith
- Complete all of these tasks in Sepulcher to gain 4. Half of them to gain 2, and one gains you 1.
.... Complete The Fracturing of Order from Therin the Ancient
.... Complete Resurrecting the Gods from Sentry Stone of Illdaera
.... Complete The Power of Alsa Thel from Planner Vanseth
.... Complete Serving the Triumvirate from Thado Penn
.... Complete Crafting the Triumvirate's Downfall from Sentry Stone of Illdaera
.... Complete To Kill a Thel Ereth Ril from Alchemist Vaskerin
.... Complete Breaching the Barrier from Sentry Stone of Illdaera
.... Complete The Triune God from Sentry Stone of Illdaera

title: Air Commander
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Reclaiming Argath"

requirements.label: Clear the first two towers in less than 10 minutes after boarding the ship.

title: Ardent Defender
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Truth"

requirements.label: While escorting the spirits, prevent undying fragments from reclaiming their energy.

title: Army of One
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Rebel Assault"

requirements.label: Defeat all of Vyer's hadal and all of Riago's unit. Then, defeat all of Archon Erie's unit.

title: Barrier-Breakers
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Breaching the Barrier"

requirements.label: Cleanse all temple entrances within 30 minutes.

title: Big Game Hunter
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Into the Abyss"

requirements.label: Defeat Ovex after he transforms into something more dangerous.

title: Bombadier
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Reclaiming Argath"

title: Clear the Roof
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Order of Three"

requirements.label: Defeat all the sharpshooters on the roof.

title: Color Coordinated
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Order of Three"

requirements.label: Complete the towers in the order of Skies, Tides, Strength, and finally Light.

title: Cool Off
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Illdaera's Vengeance"

requirements.label: Douse the boss within 5 minutes after speaking to Mechanic Vitesal.

title: Damage Control
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Secrets of the Stones"

title: Demolition Man
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Assault the Tower"

requirements.label: Attach all bombs in less than 15 minutes after entering.

title: Destruction of Avatars
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Triune God"

requirements.label: Slay each avatar that must be charmed to damage the Triune God.

title: Divine Charm
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Triune God"

requirements.label: Norrathian gods must be charmed at least ten times.

title: Erillion Blitz
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Order of Three"

requirements.label: Defeat Jerinos, Soliran, Wilo, and Pyntara within 10 minutes after Jerinos challenges you.

title: Excommunication
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Assault the Tower"

title: Exit, Stage Right
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Traitor Revealed"

requirements.label: Escape the prison and speak to Jerinos in less than 15 minutes.

title: Exterminate, Annihilate, Destroy
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Breaching the Barrier"

title: Fire Marshal
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Reclaiming Argath"

title: Fizzlemaster
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Into the Abyss"

requirements.label: Defeat Fizzlefingers after allowing him to successfully cast 5 spells.

title: Fuzzles Must Die
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Into the Abyss"

title: Golem Breaker
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Illdaera's Vengeance"

requirements.label: Defeat 15 golem splinters within 5 minutes of speaking to Mechanic Vitesal.

title: Hail to the Shark King
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Defeat of Prexus"

requirements.label: Defeat Leveth the Shark King only after defeating Desalin and Nhron.

title: Harmonious
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Sound of Silence"

requirements.label: Defeat High Priest Aldior without defeating any of their summoned allies.

title: Healing Optional
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Herald of Oratory"

requirements.label: Compete the mission without buying any Sol Ro soothers.

title: Healthy Relics
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Triune God"

requirements.label: Prevent any relic from gaining full health.

title: Heretic
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Time and Tides"

requirements.label: Defeat 16 devout templars without failing the High Priest Xalziks encounter.

title: High Tide
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Time and Tides"

requirements.label: Successfully confine the spirit of Oseka within 8 minutes of engaging the High Priests.

title: Humanoid Tsunami
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Defeat of Prexus"

requirements.label: Allow High Priest Vyers Rinad to summon 5 tidal clones before defeating them.

title: Hungry Hungry Goral
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The King of the Beasts"

requirements.label: Let the King devour 5 beasts before defeating it.

title: Hunting Trip
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Pups of War"

title: Instrumental
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Cacophony of Power"

requirements.label: Have the instruments start playing in 15 minutes after finding the first.

title: Jerinos Wins Again
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Traitor Revealed"

requirements.label: Defeat Jerinos after he hits everyone at least once with his ability.

title: Just, Die Already!
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Cacophony of Power"

requirements.label: Attempt to slay Ryken three times while the blind dreamers are still alive.

title: Light & Shadow
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Two Sides of the Stone"

requirements.label: Defeat the Shadow of Decay and Vision of Splendor within 8 minutes each time they appear.

title: Make Haste
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Secrets of the Stones"

requirements.label: Deliver all fragments within 15 minutes of defeating the first sentry stone and talk to Reklor.

title: Mana Drain
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Truth"

requirements.label: Defeat all four Mana Wards within 15 minutes of defeating the first.

title: Master of the Pillars
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Growing Threat"

requirements.label: Keep everyone alive during all of the battles.

title: Out of My Way!
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Defeat of Prexus"

requirements.label: Defeat Rysen and Yesleth in under 15 minutes after talking to High Priest Vyers.

title: Perfect Game
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Herald of Oratory"

requirements.label: Complete the mission without losing any units.

title: Perfection
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Secrets of the Stones"

requirements.label: Collect and return the radiant stone fragments without killing any Nitore.

title: Pillar Pillager
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Truth"

requirements.label: Defeat the fourth Mana Ward with all four Grasp effects.

title: Pillars of Success
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "The Growing Threat"

requirements.label: Complete all four trials perfectly and win the final battle.

title: Ramming Speed
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Illdaera's Vengeance"

requirements.label: Move both carts near the golem within 5 minutes after speaking to Mechanic Vitesal.

title: Rebel Commander
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Rebel Assault"

requirements.label: Complete the mission without losing any rebels.

title: Religious Fervor
description: This special challenge can be completed during the mission "Time and Tides"

requirements.label: Defeat 8 Zealots before attempting to confine the spirit of Oseka in High Priest Xalziks.
